skills.subtitle: Learn skills to support your child every day

crisis.title: You're not alone
crisis.subtitle: Take a breath. Let's get through this together.

step1.title: Remove Demands
step1.description: Stop all requests. Don't ask questions or give instructions. Remove expectations. Your child's nervous system is overwhelmed — reduce the load.

step2.title: Reduce Sensory Input
step2.description: Dim lights. Turn off sounds. Clear the space of people if possible. Offer noise-canceling headphones or a weighted blanket if they find those comforting.

step3.title: Stay Calm & Wait
step3.description: Sit nearby at their level. Breathe slowly. Don't touch unless they want it. Use few or no words. The meltdown will pass — your calm presence is enough.
